subject: Pilot mix ready for review
snippet: Hey Asha - mix is done. Attached the master. Let me know what you think...
body:
Hey Asha

Mix is done. Attached the master file. I went with the lighter touch on Palesa's voice like you wanted. The cold open sounds clean.

One thing - the reflection break at 30:00 might need a touch more space before the music bed drops. Your call.

Listen on headphones first, then car, then phone like we said. No rush but I know launch is close.

Naledi

subject: Off-Mic pilot invitation
snippet: Z! Been too long. I am finally building the podcast - Off-Mic - and I want you in the pilot...
body:
Z!

Been too long. I am finally building the podcast I kept talking about - Off-Mic. Real conversations, no station polish. The pilot goes to a small private group end of September and the public debut is early October.

I want you in it. Your story - leaving and coming back to Braam, building the space from nothing - is exactly the kind of thing Off-Mic is for. The Ones Who Stayed.

No pressure on format. Could be in-studio in Melville or remote if your schedule is tight. Let me know if you are open and we will find a slot.

Miss you. Say yes.

Asha

subject: Oct 2 on-air preview - talking points needed
snippet: Asha - looking forward to the Off-Mic preview on Oct 2. Can you send talking points by EOD Sept 30...
body:
Asha

Looking forward to the Off-Mic preview on Oct 2. The marketing team wants to coordinate some social around it.

Can you send talking points by EOD Sept 30? Just the basics - what the podcast is about, when people can listen, how to subscribe.

I know you want to keep editorial details close, and I respect that. Just need enough for the promo push.

Best
Nomsa

subject: Partnership inquiry - Off-Mic podcast
snippet: Hi Asha - we have been following your Off-Mic journey and would love to discuss a sponsorship...
body:
Hi Asha

We have been following your Off-Mic journey on the landing page and newsletter. Love what you are building.

We would love to discuss a sponsorship or partnership for the podcast. Nothing heavy - maybe a mention in the show notes and a discount code for listeners.

We could offer R8,500 per episode for the first season, plus product for any live events.

Let us know if you want to chat. No pressure either way.

Thabo
Roastsmith Coffee Co.

subject: Release form - where do I sign?
snippet: Hey A - Naledi mentioned you need a written release for the pilot. Just send it over...
body:
Hey A

Naledi mentioned you need a written release for the pilot. Just send it over and I will sign. You know I trust you.

Also - brunch Saturday? Lucky Bean 11 as usual?

P

subject: Gogo Miriam - update
snippet: My dear Asha - I spoke with Gogo Miriam again. She is willing but has some concerns...
body:
My dear Asha

I spoke with Gogo Miriam again about the Voices of the City finale. She is willing but has some concerns about transport and whether her English is good enough for radio.

I told her you would take care of everything and that her story matters more than perfect English. She seemed reassured.

Can you call her this week to confirm? She prefers mornings before 10. Her number is +27 82 345 6026. No email - she does not use computers.

Blessings
Grace

subject: Thursday production meeting - time change?
snippet: Hey Asha - can we move Thursday's meeting to 10:30? I have a conflict at 11:30...
body:
Hey Asha

Can we move Thursday's production meeting to 10:30? I have a conflict at 11:30 - the 30th anniversary planning committee wants me for something.

Should not affect your therapy slot - you would still have plenty of time to get to Sandton.

Let me know.

Sipho

subject: Birthday plans
snippet: Hey sis - Sofia is planning the asado for Oct 24. Can you confirm you are coming...
body:
Hey sis

Sofia is planning the asado for Oct 24. Can you confirm you are coming? The kids keep asking when Auntie Asha is visiting.

Also - Mom mentioned something about your podcast launching. When is that happening? She wants to invite her prayer group to listen.

Marco

subject: November showcase reminder
snippet: Hi Asha - just a reminder that the mentorship cohort showcase is Nov 12...
body:
Hi Asha

Just a reminder that the mentorship cohort showcase is November 12 at 2:00 PM. Your four mentees are preparing their final projects.

Thembi has been asking about your feedback on her radio documentary pitch. When you have a moment could you review her draft in Google Classroom?

Thanks
Prof Molefe
JMU Journalism Program

subject: Payment failed - Off-Mic supporter
snippet: A payment of ZAR 500.00 from Trevor Naidoo failed. The card was declined...
body:
A payment of ZAR 500.00 from Trevor Naidoo (trevor.naidoo@icloud.com) failed.

Reason: Card declined
Attempts: 2

The customer has been notified automatically. If this is a recurring issue you may want to reach out directly.

View in Stripe Dashboard: https://dashboard.stripe.com/payments/py_xxx

subject: Quick thought
snippet: Hey love - been thinking about what you said about the pilot feeling too polished...
body:
Hey love

Been thinking about what you said about the pilot feeling too polished. Maybe that is okay? Your voice is the rough edge. The production can be clean.

Also - dinner plans for your birthday are sorted. Just show up hungry.

Missing you. See you tonight?

K

subject: Tuesday recording
snippet: Madam Asha - confirming I will be there Tuesday 2pm. My cousin will cover my shift...
body:
Madam Asha

Confirming I will be there Tuesday 2pm at the station. My cousin will cover my taxi shift.

I am a bit nervous but my wife says this is a blessing. She listens to your show every morning.

Thank you for choosing my story.

Thabo Mosia
